narrative:
Brown Township has 3,895 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a clear Republican lean of 8.2 percentage points.
